text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, no... Don't worry about it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That machine has such a weak arm. It's no wonder
you couldn't get anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It really needs to do some serious muscle training!
It's not your fault, Trainer!
